name: Apple-Oatmeal-Raisin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Apple, peeled and chopped (such as Granny Smith)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Combine oats, flours, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon in a medium bowl. Stir in raisins and apples. In a large bowl, combine egg, honey, oil, and milk. Stir in dry ingredients until well combined. Form the dough into smooth balls using water on your fingers to prevent sticking. Drop batter by rounded teaspoon onto ungreased cookie sheet, leaving 2 inches between each cookie. Press dough down with the back of the spoon to form cookies about 1 1/2 inches in diameter. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden. Transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool.
